output.conditionNotes: - Prone: +4 AC vs ranged attacks, -4 vs melee; can't use ranged except crossbows
- Blinded: All sight-based checks auto-fail, 50% miss chance, half speed
- Dazed: Cannot take actions, no penalty to AC
- Staggered: Can take only a single move OR standard action each round
- Stunned: Drop items, can't act, -2 AC, lose Dex to AC. Attackers get +4 to CMB
- Shaken: -2 penalty on attacks, saves, skills, and ability checks
- Paralyzed: Frozen in place, helpless, cannot move, STR & DEX = 0; mental actions only
- Grappled: -2 attacks, -4 DEX, can't move, no stealth, can't cast with somatic components unless concentration check
- Flat-Footed: Lose DEX bonus to AC, cannot make AoO (unless Combat Reflexes)
- Nauseated: Can't attack, cast, concentrate, or do anything requiring attention. Only a single move action per turn
- Sickened: -2 penalty on attack rolls, weapon damage rolls, saving throws, skill checks, and ability checks
- Frightened: -2 penalty on attacks, saves, skills, and ability checks; must flee from fear source if possible
- Panicked: -2 penalty on attacks, saves, skills, and ability checks; drop held items, flee randomly from all dangers
- Deafened: -4 initiative checks, auto-fail Listen checks, 20% spell failure for verbal components
- Exhausted: -6 STR and DEX, half speed, can't run or charge; 1 hour rest makes fatigued
- Fatigued: -2 STR and DEX, can't run or charge; doing fatiguing activity makes exhausted
- Entangled: -2 attack rolls, -4 DEX, half speed, can't run/charge; concentration check DC 15+spell level to cast
- Helpless: DEX = 0, attackers get +4 melee bonus, subject to coup de grace, rogues can sneak attack
- Confused: Roll d% each turn: 01-10 attack caster, 11-20 act normal, 21-50 babble, 51-70 flee, 71-100 attack nearest creature

output.buffNotes: - Enlarged: +2 STR, -2 DEX, -1 attack/AC, +1 CMB/CMD, reach +5ft, -4 Stealth, larger weapon damage
- Bull's Strength: +4 enhancement bonus to Strength
- Cat's Grace: +4 enhancement bonus to Dexterity
- Bear's Endurance: +4 enhancement bonus to Constitution
- Fox's Cunning: +4 enhancement bonus to Intelligence
- Owl's Wisdom: +4 enhancement bonus to Wisdom
- Eagle's Splendor: +4 enhancement bonus to Charisma
- Bless: +1 morale bonus on attack rolls and saving throws against fear effects

- Blessing of Fervor:
`INPUT\[inlineSelect(option(+30ft. Speed), option(Stand as Swift), option(Extra Attack), option(+2 Atk/AC/Reflex), option(Free Metamagic)):bofChoice\]`
- Haste: +1 attack/AC/Ref, +30ft speed, extra attack at full BAB
- Barkskin: +2 enhancement bonus to natural armor (does not apply to touch AC)
- Magic Weapon: +1 enhancement bonus to weapon attacks and damage
- Shield: +4 shield bonus to AC (does not apply to touch AC)
- Mage Armor: +4 armor bonus to AC (does not apply to touch AC)

- Blessing of Fervor:
`INPUT\[inlineSelect(option(+30ft. Speed), option(Stand as Swift), option(Extra Attack), option(+2 Atk/AC/Reflex), option(Free Metamagic)):bofChoice\]`
Current Effect: +30 feet enhancement bonus to speed

- Blessing of Fervor:
`INPUT\[inlineSelect(option(+30ft. Speed), option(Stand as Swift), option(Extra Attack), option(+2 Atk/AC/Reflex), option(Free Metamagic)):bofChoice\]`
Current Effect: Can stand from prone as a swift action

- Blessing of Fervor:
`INPUT\[inlineSelect(option(+30ft. Speed), option(Stand as Swift), option(Extra Attack), option(+2 Atk/AC/Reflex), option(Free Metamagic)):bofChoice\]`
Current Effect: One extra attack at highest base attack bonus. Does not stack with haste.

`INPUT\[inlineSelect(option(+30ft. Speed), option(Stand as Swift), option(Extra Attack), option(+2 Atk/AC/Reflex), option(Free Metamagic)):bofChoice\]`Current Effect: +2 competence bonus to attack rolls, AC, and Reflex saves

- Blessing of Fervor:
`INPUT\[inlineSelect(option(+30ft. Speed), option(Stand as Swift), option(Extra Attack), option(+2 Atk/AC/Reflex), option(Free Metamagic)):bofChoice\]`Current Effect: Apply metamagic (enlarged, extended, silent, or still) to 2nd level or lower spell for free.
